purpose: Evaluate GateZero logo and identity outputs.

evals.criterion: Communicates research, risk control, disciplined execution, and operator judgment without implying profit.
Works clearly in one color on light and dark backgrounds.
Curves, alignment, stroke rhythm, negative space, and proportions are intentional.
Wordmark has optical spacing, custom feel, and appropriate fintech personality.
App icon is distinct, balanced, and usable in product contexts.
Includes symbol, lockups, app icon, monochrome, reversed, small-size, and usage notes.
Avoids casino, crypto-hype, get-rich-quick, excessive arrows, mascot aggression, and generic AI tropes.
Usable by a designer/developer in Figma, SVG, app, and web production contexts.

acceptance_rule: All blocking criteria must meet threshold.
